PETITION TO TERMINATE CONSERVATORSHIP OF PERSON AND ESTATE, CALENDAR OF DEC-17-2020 - HEARING HELD. A NEW PLACEMENT FOR HEIDI PACHECO HAS NOT BEEN FOUND OR BECOME AVAILABLE. DISCUSSIONS ARE HELD. AT THE CONCLUSION OF DISCUSSIONS, THE PETITION IS DISMISSED. THE SFPG IS TO CONTINUE THEIR EFFORTS TO LOCATE A MORE SUITABLE PLACEMENT FOR MS. PACHECO. ONCE A SUITABLE PLACEMENT IS FOUND MS. PACHECO MAY PETITION TO TERMINATE THE CONSERVATORSHIP. THE COURT SET A STATUS ON PLACEMENT FOR 6/3/21 AT 9:00 A.M., IN DEPT. 204. AT HIS REQUEST, MR. LACHONA IS RELIEVED AS COURT-APPOINTED COUNSEL. - SEE MINI-MINUTES FOR ADDITIONAL DETAILS -
